ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., country, region, airline) */,
  "entity_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the entity */,
  "entity_code" TEXT /* A unique code for the entity (e.g., ISO country code) */,
  "entity_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent entity (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which accident data is available */,
  "year_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the year (e.g., January 1st) */,
  "year_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the year (e.g., December 31st) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_types" (
  "accident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident type */,
  "accident_type" TEXT /* Type of accident */,
  "accident_type_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the accident type */,
  "accident_type_code" TEXT /* A unique code for the accident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity to which the accident belongs */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year in which the accident occurred */,
  "accident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of accident */,
  "accident_date" TEXT /* The specific date of the accident */,
  "accident_location" TEXT /* The location where the accident occurred */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* The model of the aircraft involved */,
  "operator" TEXT /* The operator of the aircraft (e.g., airline) */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* The flight number of the accident */,
  "accidents" INTEGER /* Number of accidents */,
  "casualties" INTEGER /* Number of casualties */,
  "total_fatalities" INTEGER /* Total number of fatalities (including both casualties and fatalities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_accident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_type_id") REFERENCES accident_types ("accident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "en_route_accidents" (
  "en_route_accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each en route accident */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident to which the en route accident belongs */,
  "en_route_accidents" INTEGER /* Number of en route accidents */,
  "en_route_casualties" INTEGER /* Number of casualties in en route accidents */,
  "en_route_location" TEXT /* The specific location of the en route accident */,
  "en_route_conditions" TEXT /* Weather and other conditions during the en route phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("en_route_accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_en_route_accidents_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "takeoff_accidents" (
  "takeoff_accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each takeoff accident */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident to which the takeoff accident belongs */,
  "takeoff_accidents" INTEGER /* Number of takeoff accidents */,
  "takeoff_casualties" INTEGER /* Number of casualties in takeoff accidents */,
  "takeoff_location" TEXT /* The specific location of the takeoff accident (e.g., airport) */,
  "takeoff_conditions" TEXT /* Weather and other conditions during takeoff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("takeoff_accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_takeoff_accidents_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "initial_climb_accidents" (
  "initial_climb_accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initial climb accident */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident to which the initial climb accident belongs */,
  "initial_climb_accidents" INTEGER /* Number of initial climb accidents */,
  "initial_climb_casualties" INTEGER /* Number of casualties in initial climb accidents */,
  "initial_climb_location" TEXT /* The specific location of the initial climb accident */,
  "initial_climb_conditions" TEXT /* Weather and other conditions during the initial climb phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initial_climb_accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initial_climb_accidents_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approach_accidents" (
  "approach_accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approach accident */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident to which the approach accident belongs */,
  "approach_accidents" INTEGER /* Number of approach accidents */,
  "approach_fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in approach accidents */,
  "approach_location" TEXT /* The specific location of the approach accident */,
  "approach_conditions" TEXT /* Weather and other conditions during the approach phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approach_accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approach_accidents_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landing_accidents" (
  "landing_accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landing accident */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident to which the landing accident belongs */,
  "landing_accidents" INTEGER /* Number of landing accidents */,
  "landing_fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in landing accidents */,
  "landing_location" TEXT /* The specific location of the landing accident */,
  "landing_conditions" TEXT /* Weather and other conditions during the landing phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landing_accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landing_accidents_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_causes" (
  "accident_cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident cause */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident to which the cause belongs */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the accident */,
  "cause_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the cause */,
  "cause_category" TEXT /* A category for the cause (e.g., mechanical, human error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_causes_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigations" (
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident being investigated */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Status of the investigation */,
  "investigation_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the investigation */,
  "investigation_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the investigation */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* The name of the lead investigator */,
  "investigation_report_url" TEXT /* URL to the full investigation report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigation to which the recommendation belongs */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Safety recommendation */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* The date when the recommendation was issued */,
  "recommendation_category" TEXT /* A category for the recommendation (e.g., operational, regulatory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_investigation_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigation_id") REFERENCES investigations ("investigation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "user_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
